name: Medical Supplies
description: Used by Aegis heroes for powerful healing.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, red inner line, resembling modern medical packaging. In the center, a sterile white metal box with a red cross symbol is open, revealing neatly arranged bandages and a syringe.

name: Monster Core Shard
description: A fragment of a monster's essence, valuable to the System.

card_images.description: A dark, jagged border that flickers with red digital static. In the center, a crystalline shard of dark purple rock pulses with a faint, malevolent red light.

name: Energy Bar
description: Can be used to restore a small amount of MP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, blue inner line, resembling modern energy product packaging. In the center, a silver foil wrapper is partially torn open to reveal a dense, nutrient bar that is a vibrant, glowing blue.

name: Clean Water
description: Essential for survivor well-being. Restores a tiny amount of HP.

card_images.description: A simple, brushed aluminum border with small rivets in the corners. In the center, a clear glass bottle with a cork stopper is filled with pristine, sparkling water.

name: System Shard
description: A rare fragment of the System itself.

card_images.description: A border made of a glowing blue, hexagonal data-grid pattern. In the center, a perfectly geometric, translucent crystal refracts light into a rainbow of digital patterns.

name: First Aid Kit
description: A better version of Medical Supplies.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, red inner line, resembling modern medical packaging. In the center, a durable red canvas bag with a white cross emblem is unzipped to show neatly packed rolls of gauze and medical tools.

name: Mana Crystal
description: A crystal humming with energy. Restores MP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, blue inner line, resembling modern energy product packaging. In the center, a fist-sized, uncut blue crystal floats just above a surface, emitting a soft, blue glow.

name: Corrupted Data Fragment
description: An unstable piece of monster data.

card_images.description: A dark, jagged border that flickers with red digital static. In the center, a flickering, glitching shard of black glass is covered in red, pixelated static.

name: Pure Energy Crystal
description: A flawless crystal used in high-end items.

card_images.description: A border made of a glowing blue, hexagonal data-grid pattern. In the center, a perfectly cut, diamond-like crystal shines with a brilliant, pure white light.

name: Lesser Healing Salve
description: A basic salve that restores a small amount of HP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, red inner line, resembling modern medical packaging. In the center, a small, open clay pot contains a thick, green, herbal paste.

name: Lesser Mana Vial
description: A small vial that restores a bit of MP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, blue inner line, resembling modern energy product packaging. In the center, a small, corked glass vial is filled with a swirling, light-blue liquid that glows faintly.

name: Standard Healing Potion
description: Restores a moderate amount of HP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, red inner line, resembling modern medical packaging. In the center, a classic, teardrop-shaped glass flask is filled with a bubbling, vibrant red liquid.

name: Standard Mana Potion
description: Restores a moderate amount of MP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, blue inner line, resembling modern energy product packaging. In the center, a round flask is filled with a deep blue liquid containing tiny, star-like motes of light.

name: Greater Healing Potion
description: A potent elixir that restores a large amount of HP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, red inner line, resembling modern medical packaging. In the center, an ornate, crystal decanter is filled with a radiant, crimson liquid that pulses with light.

name: Greater Mana Potion
description: A potent elixir that restores a large amount of MP.

card_images.description: A clean, white border with a thin, blue inner line, resembling modern energy product packaging. In the center, a tall, elegant glass bottle contains a swirling, deep violet liquid that resembles a miniature galaxy.

name: Cloth Armor
description: Basic cloth armor providing minimal protection.

card_images.description: A simple border with the texture of coarse, stitched grey canvas. In the center, a simple, sleeveless tunic made of patched brown cloth is displayed on a wooden armor stand.

name: Leather Armor
description: Sturdy leather armor offering moderate protection.

card_images.description: A border with the texture of dark brown, stitched leather. In the center, a set of worn but well-maintained boiled leather armor is mounted on a stand.

name: Chainmail Armor
description: Interlocking metal rings providing good protection against slashing attacks.

card_images.description: A border showing a clean, interlocking pattern of steel chainmail rings. In the center, a long-sleeved hauberk of steel rings is draped over an armor stand, gleaming dully.

name: Plate Armor
description: Heavy plate armor offering excellent physical protection.

card_images.description: A border of heavy, brushed steel plates joined by rivets. In the center, a full suit of polished steel plate armor stands stoically as if ready for battle.

name: Aegis Power Armor
description: Advanced powered armor used by Aegis heroes, offering superior protection.

card_images.description: A futuristic border of interlocking white and blue geometric plates with glowing seams. In the center, a suit of white and blue powered armor stands in a high-tech bay, with glowing energy lines along its limbs.

name: Reinforced Leather
description: Leather armor reinforced with metal studs for better defense.

card_images.description: A border with the texture of dark brown, stitched leather, studded with small iron rivets. In the center, a black leather cuirass is reinforced with rows of polished iron rivets.

name: Hardened Chainmail
description: Chainmail hardened through a special process, increasing its durability.

card_images.description: A border showing a clean, interlocking pattern of dark, hardened steel chainmail rings. In the center, a suit of dark, almost black chainmail with thick rings gives off a faint, bluish sheen.

name: Masterwork Plate
description: Expertly crafted plate armor, lighter and stronger than the standard version.

card_images.description: A border of polished, ornate steel plates with elegant golden inlay. In the center, a suit of ornate, fluted plate armor features intricate gold filigree along its edges.

name: Apprentice's Wand
description: A simple wooden wand for novice magic users.

card_images.description: A border of light, unpolished wood with simple twine wrappings. In the center, a short, crooked wand of ash wood has a small quartz crystal bound to its tip.

name: Adept's Wand
description: A well-balanced wand for an experienced magic user.

card_images.description: A border of polished oak with thin, inlaid silver wire. In the center, a straight, polished oak wand has a silver band at its base and a focused crystal at the tip that glows faintly.

name: Mage's Scepter
description: A powerful scepter that greatly amplifies a user's magic.

card_images.description: A border of dark, polished ebony with glowing purple runes carved into it. In the center, a long, ornate scepter is topped with a large, glowing amethyst orb held in a golden setting.

name: Rusted Shortsword
description: A basic, rusted shortsword. Better than nothing.

card_images.description: A simple border of pitted, rust-colored iron. In the center, a shortsword with a fraying leather hilt has patches of orange rust dotting its pitted blade.

name: Steel Longsword
description: A reliable longsword made of forged steel.

card_images.description: A border of clean, forged steel resembling the crossguard of a sword. In the center, a classic arming sword with a polished steel blade rests on a weapon rack.

name: Titanium Greatsword
description: A massive greatsword made from a lightweight and durable titanium alloy.

card_images.description: A border of dark grey, modern titanium alloy with sharp, geometric angles. In the center, a huge, two-handed greatsword with a modern design and a dark grey blade is displayed.

name: Wooden Buckler
description: A small, light wooden shield for parrying.

card_images.description: A border of dark wooden planks held together by a riveted iron band. In the center, a small, round shield made of wooden planks has a simple iron boss in the middle.

name: Iron Kite Shield
description: A large, sturdy iron shield offering significant protection.

card_images.description: A border of heavy, overlapping iron plates with large rivets. In the center, a large, teardrop-shaped shield made of riveted iron plates leans against a stone wall, scuffed from battle.

name: Aegis Barrier
description: A high-tech energy barrier projector, the pinnacle of Vanguard defensive gear.

card_images.description: A border composed of a shimmering, translucent blue hexagonal energy pattern. In the center, a sleek, forearm-mounted device projects a large, hexagonal, translucent blue energy field.

name: Simple Bow
description: A basic but reliable wooden bow. Does not use magic.

card_images.description: A simple border with the texture of light-colored yew wood. In the center, a classic yew longbow with a linen bowstring rests against a straw target dummy.

name: Advanced Bow
description: A composite bow with a stronger pull, for skilled archers.

card_images.description: A border of dark, laminated wood with a modern, composite texture. In the center, a powerful recurve bow made of laminated layers of wood and horn is displayed.

name: Arrows (100)
description: A bundle of 100 simple arrows. Can be sold.

card_images.description: A border with the texture of dark, ballistic nylon fabric. In the center, a leather quiver is filled to the brim with arrows that have steel tips and grey feather fletching.
